solo-ringer.name: Solo Ringer
solo-ringer.description: Players play 2 rounds. Best net score on each hole across both rounds forms the ringer card. Lowest ringer total wins. Single-round scores count if a player only completes one round.

tiebreakers.label: Handicap index countback (index 1 first, then 2, etc.)

escalator-doom.name: Escalator of Doom
escalator-doom.description: 3-player teams. Holes 1–6: 1 net best ball. Holes 7–12: 2 net best ball (sum of 2 lowest). Holes 13–18: all 3 net scores. Team total vs. adjusted par. Tiebreaker: team net aggregate.

tiebreakers.label: Team net aggregate (sum of all 3 players' net totals)

devils-draw.name: Devil's Draw
devils-draw.description: 3-player teams. After all play concludes, 18 holes are drawn live into 4 categories: 5 holes as 3-net best ball (all 3 scores), 6 holes as 2-net best ball, 5 holes as 1-net best ball, and 2 holes score ZERO (don't count). Since the draw is unknown during play, all players must score every hole.

tiebreakers.label: Team net aggregate (sum of all 3 players' net totals)

best2-worst2-all3.name: Best 2, Worst 2, All 3
best2-worst2-all3.description: 3-player teams. Par 5s: best 2 net scores. Par 4s: worst 2 net scores. Par 3s: all 3 net scores. Adjusted par is 2× on par 4s and 5s, 3× on par 3s. Tiebreaker: team net aggregate.

tiebreakers.label: Team net aggregate (sum of all 3 players' net totals)

shamble-2man.name: 2-Man Shamble
shamble-2man.description: 2-player teams. Both players tee off, select the best drive, then each plays their own ball. Team records the best net score per hole. Tiebreakers: team net aggregate, then scorecard countback starting from index hole 1.

tiebreakers.label: Team net aggregate (sum of both players' net totals)

lone-ranger.name: 3-Man Lone Ranger
lone-ranger.description: 3-player teams declare slot order (1/2/3) before play. Each hole: the Lone Ranger's net score is mandatory, plus the best ball of the other two. Slot 1 is LR on holes 1,4,7,10,13,16 · Slot 2 on 2,5,8,11,14,17 · Slot 3 on 3,6,9,12,15,18. Adjusted par is 2× per hole. Tiebreaker: team net aggregate.

tiebreakers.label: Team net aggregate (sum of all 3 players' net totals)
